    "Severe electrical arcing and buzzing sound originating from inside the panel",
    "High risk of thermal runaway, fire, or catastrophic phase-to-phase fault",
    "Violation of NEC 110.14 regarding proper termination torque and connection integrity"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Immediately isolate and de-energize the electrical panel following proper LOTO procedures",
    "Perform a thermal imaging scan and physical inspection of all terminations and splices",
    "Re-terminate damaged conductors and torque all connections to manufacturer specifications"
  ],
  "rationale": "The audio recording reveals a highly unstable, sputtering electrical arc/buzz rather than a normal, steady transformer hum. This indicates a loose, degraded, or failing termination that is actively arcing under load, posing an immediate fire and safety hazard.",

    "NEC 110.14",
    "NFPA 70E"
  ]
